description: The Hells Angels Motorcycle Club is an international outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1948 in Fontana, California. Members are alleged to engage in drug trafficking, gunrunning, extortion, and other organized crime activities, though the club claims to be a group of motorcycle enthusiasts. It has chapters in many countries, including Argentina, Australia, and Austria. The club is classified as a motorcycle gang by numerous police and intelligence agencies.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Argentine branch of the HAMC was established with a charter in Buenos Aires on 16 June 1999.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels established a chapter in Buenos Aires and engaged in a shootout with a rival gang.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels expanded to Australia in 1975, initially establishing chapters in Melbourne and Sydney...
country_links.context: The Hells Angels expanded to Australia, establishing chapters and engaging in drug trafficking and other crimes.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Austrian branch of the Hells Angels was established when the club formed a chapter in Vorarlberg in November 1975.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels formed a chapter in Vorarlberg and are involved in prostitution and drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: Belgium became home to its first Hells Angels chapter in the summer of 1997...
country_links.context: The Hells Angels established a chapter in Belgium and were involved in violent raids and drug supply.

country_links.evidence_quote: According to CBC News, the Hells Angels have thirty-four chapters operating in Canada with 1,260 full-fledged (patched) members.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have thirty-four chapters operating in Canada with 1,260 members.

country_links.evidence_quote: One of the men allegedly sailed from Colombia with the drugs.
country_links.context: One of the arrested Canadian Hells Angels allegedly sailed from Colombia with drugs.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2007, a Hells Angels-associated gang named Altid Klar-81... was formed in Denmark... On August 14, 2008, Osman Nuri Dogan... was shot and killed by an AK81 member in Tingbjerg.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels and its support group AK81 operate in Denmark, engaging in drug trafficking, turf wars, and violence.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels have 9 chapters and 130 members in Finland. The club is classified as a criminal organization by the National Bureau of Investigation.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have chapters and members in Finland, classified as a criminal organization.

country_links.evidence_quote: The first Hells Angels chapter in France was founded on 18 April 1981... The club has six French chapters.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have multiple chapters in France and are involved in cocaine trafficking and violence.

country_links.evidence_quote: In January 2010, the President of the Flensburg Hells Angels was arrested, accused of attempted homicide and hit-and-run driving... On March 17, 2010, a Bonn Hells Angels member shot dead a 42-year-old police officer... Eight members of the Hells Angels' Berlin charter... were sentenced to life in prison... for the murder of Tahrir Özbek...
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have multiple chapters in Germany and are involved in violent crimes, including murder, shootings, and extortion.

country_links.evidence_quote: Fáfnir became an official HAMC support club during a visit to a Hells Angels event in England... In March 2011, Fáfnir 'patched over' to the Hells Angels at a ceremony in Oslo, Norway.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels established a presence in Iceland when the Fáfnir motorcycle gang patched over to become a Hells Angels support club and later a chapter.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Youssafi brothers, belonging to the Hells Angels Nomads chapter of Luxembourg, remained in Mallorca.
country_links.context: The Youssafi brothers belonged to the Hells Angels Nomads chapter of Luxembourg.

country_links.evidence_quote: The first Hells Angels chapter in the Netherland was formed in 1978... The Hells Angels control much of the drug trade in the Netherlands, and are also involved in prostitution.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have multiple chapters in the Netherlands, control much of the drug trade, and are involved in prostitution and violence.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels' first international chapter was opened in Auckland on 1 July 1961... The Angels are the most influential organised crime group in New Zealand and are involved in the manufacture and distribution of methamphetamine...
country_links.context: The Hells Angels opened their first international chapter in New Zealand and are involved in methamphetamine manufacture and distribution.

country_links.evidence_quote: Due to the extent of the criminal activities of HAMC in Norway, Kripos... considers the Hells Angels Motorcycle Club to be a criminal organisation.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have a chapter in Norway and are considered a criminal organization by Norwegian police, with members convicted of various crimes.

country_links.evidence_quote: In July 2019, Portuguese prosecutors charged 89 members of Hells Angels with involvement in organized crime, attempted murder, robbery, drug trafficking...
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have members in Portugal who were charged with organized crime, attempted murder, and drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: In November 2020, Romanian Hells Angels national president Marius Lazăr was arrested... on cocaine trafficking charges... club members had travelled to Bucharest to arrange the details of the transport.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have a national president in Romania who was arrested for cocaine trafficking, with club members involved in arranging transport.

country_links.evidence_quote: Hells Angels member Alexander Bely... was arrested in 2006 before being extradited to Russia in February 2013, alleged to have organised the delivery of 224 kilograms of ephedrine to the country...
country_links.context: Hells Angels member Alexander Bely was extradited to Russia for organizing ephedrine deliveries from South Africa.

country_links.evidence_quote: The first HAMC chapter in South Africa was founded in Johannesburg on 14 August 1993.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels established chapters in South Africa, manufactured and trafficked methamphetamine there, and were involved in violent incidents and drug smuggling.

country_links.evidence_quote: In June 2023, five members of a drug gang associated with the Hells Angels were arrested in a joint operation conducted by police in Denmark and Spain... two others were taken into custody in Málaga by the Spanish National Police Corps.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have members arrested in Spain for drug trafficking as part of a joint operation with Danish police.

country_links.evidence_quote: Morgan 'Molle' Blomgren, a member of the Helsingborg chapter of the Hells Angels, disappeared... Police believe Blomgren was killed by the Helsingborg Hells Angels... Another member... Fredrik Lindberg, also disappeared... police also suspect he was murdered by the Hells Angels... On 20 August 2001, two former members... were stabbed and beaten to death at the Hells Angels' clubhouse in Gunnilse outside Gothenburg... Police foiled an alleged kidnapping by the Hells Angels... In May 2012, a group of Hells Angels crashed a private party... attacking and robbing around 30 people...
country_links.context: The Hells Angels killed or kidnapped members in Sweden, and attacked a party in Kalmar.

country_links.evidence_quote: Since 2012, Thailand has hosted Hells Angels nomads... A Pattaya chapter was founded in April 2016... Australian Hells Angels member Luke Joshua Cook... sentenced to death... for attempting to smuggle half a ton of methamphetamine from China into Thailand... Wayne Schneider... was abducted... and beaten to death by five other Hells Angels.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have chapters and members in Thailand, and members smuggled drugs through Thailand.

country_links.evidence_quote: planned to launder 'a significant quantity' of money from its activities in Germany and Turkey in the construction of a Formula One race track in Mallorca.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels planned to launder money from activities in Turkey.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels have twelve chapters and an estimated 250 members in the United Kingdom... involved in cannabis and amphetamine trafficking, as well as contract killing, extortion, prostitution, money laundering and credit card fraud.
country_links.context: The Hells Angels have twelve chapters and an estimated 250 members in the United Kingdom, involved in various crimes.

country_links.evidence_quote: An international drug smuggling ring involving Hells Angels in South Africa and the United States was allegedly established in November 1999...
country_links.context: The Hells Angels in South Africa smuggled methamphetamine to the United States, where it was distributed.
